ValidationRule.description: This checks if Send Dmart HAnds Service is TRUE the Smart Hands Date(Date_of_Smart_Hands_Arrival__c) is Required
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT ( $Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_Opportunity_Validation_Rules__c ) && OR(( Send_Smart_Hands_Service__c && ISBLANK( Date_of_Smart_Hands_Arrival__c )), Send_Smart_Hands_Service__c = false && NOT(ISBLANK( Date_of_Smart_Hands_Arrival__c )))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Date of Smart Hands Arrival is only required when Send Smart Hands Service is checked
